metadata.description: Primary Azure region for all resources.
Environment name (azd). Used for the resource group and tagging.
public = Option B; private = Option C.
MCP data provider. Default representative (no external calls).
MCP endpoint auth. oauth (Entra ID) is the target.
Short prefix used in resource names, e.g. harman-ll.
Entra tenant used to validate MCP tokens (defaults to the deployment tenant).
Application (client) ID of the API app registration protecting the MCP endpoint.
Audience the MCP API expects in tokens, e.g. api://<client-id>.
Jira base URL (consumed only when providerMode=jira).
Jira project key (consumed only when providerMode=jira).
Key Vault secret name that will hold the Jira PAT (created empty; customer sets the value).
VNet address space for Option C.
Container image tag/reference to deploy. azd overrides this.
Object ID of the deploying user/service principal for Key Vault data-plane RBAC (optional).
Explicit resource group name. When empty, defaults to rg-<environmentName>. The group is created by this deployment.
Azure region.
Resource tags.
Unique token for globally-unique names.
Resource naming prefix.
Azure region.
Resource tags.
Unique token for globally-unique names.
Resource naming prefix.
Azure region.
Resource tags.
Unique token for globally-unique names.
Principal ID of the managed identity that pulls images.
Azure region.
Resource tags.
Resource naming prefix.
Unique token for globally-unique names.
VNet address space, e.g. 10.20.0.0/16.
Azure region.
Resource tags.
Unique token for globally-unique names.
Resource naming prefix.
Managed identity principal id granted Key Vault Secrets User.
Optional deployer principal id granted Key Vault Secrets Officer for data-plane setup.
Whether to lock the vault behind a private endpoint (Option C).
Private endpoint subnet id (required when isPrivate).
VNet id for the private DNS zone link (required when isPrivate).
Name of the Jira PAT secret (created empty; customer sets the value).
Azure region.
Resource tags.
Unique token for globally-unique names.
Resource naming prefix.
Option C when true: internal (VNet-injected) ingress, no public endpoint.
Container image reference. azd overrides this after building.
ACR login server for image pulls.
User-assigned managed identity resource id.
User-assigned managed identity client id (for token federation in-app).
Log Analytics customer id.
Log Analytics shared key.
Application Insights connection string.
Container Apps infrastructure subnet id (required when isPrivate).
MCP data provider mode.
MCP endpoint auth mode.
Entra tenant id used to validate tokens.
API app registration client id.
Token audience expected by the API.
Jira base URL (providerMode=jira only).
Jira project key (providerMode=jira only).
Azure region.
Resource tags.
Resource naming prefix.
Unique token for globally-unique names.
Backend MCP server URL (Container App internal FQDN).
Entra tenant id used for JWT validation.
Audience the API expects in tokens.
API app registration client id (bare GUID) accepted as a second audience.
Application Insights connection string for gateway telemetry.
Resource ID of the dedicated APIM subnet used for VNet injection.
Publisher email for the APIM instance.
Publisher org name for the APIM instance.

variables.policyTemplate:
<policies>
  <inbound>
    <base />
    <validate-jwt header-name="Authorization" failed-validation-httpcode="401" failed-validation-error-message="Unauthorized. Access token is missing or invalid.">
      <openid-config url="__OPENID_CONFIG__" />
      <audiences>
        <audience>__AUDIENCE1__</audience>
        <audience>__AUDIENCE2__</audience>
      </audiences>
    </validate-jwt>
    <rate-limit calls="120" renewal-period="60" />
  </inbound>
  <backend>
    <base />
  </backend>
  <outbound>
    <base />
  </outbound>
  <on-error>
    <base />
  </on-error>
</policies>

metadata.description: Resource tags.
Container Apps environment default domain, e.g. <name>.<region>.azurecontainerapps.io.
Container Apps environment internal static IP (internal load balancer).
VNet resource id to link the private DNS zone to.
The endpoint to register in Copilot Studio (APIM gateway in private mode, Container App URL in public mode).

MCP_ENDPOINT_URL.value: [if(variables('isPrivate'), format('{0}/mcp/mcp', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('rgName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'apim'), '2025-04-01').outputs.gatewayUrl.value), format('https://{0}/mcp', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('rgName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'compute'), '2025-04-01').outputs.appFqdn.value))]
